statement: This record remains negative evidence on build 26100: the repo did not produce enough supporting proof to promote it into a normal actionable surface.
gating_reason: Archived audit trail only. Keep this out of the normal tweak surface.

links.title: Repo source note for audio.disable-system-sounds
links.summary: The repo source note links the AppEvents sound-scheme bundle to upstream nohuto research and marks the tweak as repo-backed.

links.title: Current app implementation
links.summary: The provider writes empty strings to many HKCU\AppEvents\Schemes sound mappings.
